_README: PROJECT ADAPTER. This is the ONLY file you must fill in per project. The generic agents/hooks read it. Leave a value as an empty string to mark a gate 'not configured' (it will be skipped, not failed). See docs/GETTING_STARTED.md and docs/PROMPTS.md.

modules.name: example-core
modules.description: What lives here. Workers assigned to this module must not edit outside `path`.

gates._note: Exact shell commands for this repo. Run from repo root. Empty string = skip.

review._consensus_note: 'all' = every lens must approve; or an integer = that many approvals required.

budget._note: Opus to coordinate/review, Sonnet to build, Haiku to explore. Lower max_parallel_workers if review/merge is your bottleneck.
